case_title: TAN TAI TRAN VS. KATHY DIEP THAI

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF TRAN, TAN TAI AS TO DEFENDANT THAI, KATHY DIEP , AN INIDIVIDUAL DBA STUDIO 800 AND DBA 2000 HAIR STUDIO JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TRAN, TAN TAI RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT THAI, KATHY DIEP , AN INIDIVIDUAL DBA STUDIO 800 AND DBA 2000 HAIR STUDIO $8,084.64 PRINCIPAL, $441.88 INTEREST, $180.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $8,706.52, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
